channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi-K3 tops Frontend Code Arena
item.description: It matches Claude Fable 5 performance at 35% cost.
item.content:encoded:
It matches Claude Fable 5 performance at 35% cost.

Original source: http://Kimi.com

item.title: Anthropic makes Claude Fable 5 permanent on premium plans
item.description: Pro and Team Standard plans receive a $100 credit.
item.content:encoded:
Pro and Team Standard plans receive a $100 credit.

Original source: https://support.claude.com/en/articles/15910845-claude-code-may-july-2026-weekly-limits-promotion

item.title: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3 2.8T open-weights MoE model
item.description: The model features a native 1-million-token context window
item.content:encoded:
The model features a native 1-million-token context window

Original source: http://Kimi.com

item.title: Dean W. Ball says Chinese Kimi K3 matches leading coding models
item.description: The open-weight model is highly token-intensive and expensive.
item.content:encoded:
The open-weight model is highly token-intensive and expensive.

Original source: https://www.transformernews.ai/p/kimi-k3-is-no-reason-for-china-panic-export-controls-xi-jingping

item.title: Russ Salakhutdinov's alumni retrospective sparks academic advising debate
item.description: The CMU professor's alumni include founders of Mistral and xAI.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Moonshot AI founder's departure sparks US AI immigration debate
item.description: David Pfau proposed automatic O-1 visas for ML PhDs.
item.content:encoded:
David Pfau proposed automatic O-1 visas for ML PhDs.

Original source: https://dhs.gov/news/2026/07/16/trump-administration-issues-final-rule-end-foreign-student-visa-abuse

item.title: UK AISI: Open-weight hacking gap shrinks to 4–7 months
item.description: GLM-5.2 matched the performance of Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.5.
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Pieter Levels switches OpenCode workflow to Kimi K3 over safety blocks
item.description: Claude Code repeatedly blocked his emulator and health query tasks
item.content:encoded:

item.title: David Sacks warns US regulations risk ceding AI lead to China
item.description: Kimi K3 topped the Frontend Code Arena benchmark.
item.content:encoded:
Kimi K3 topped the Frontend Code Arena benchmark.

Original source: https://thehill.com/policy/technology/5975303-david-sacks-us-artificial-intelligence-kimi-k3-moonshot-ai/
